name: 25" Wide Square Ella Planter  Cast Stone  Black - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Give your plant babies a new home that will keep them thriving in style. From its sleek tapered design to its lightweight concrete structure, our planter will instantly enhance your patio or backyard space with style. This accessory offers a durable construction to ensure that your plant has a stable home to grow. Complemented with a matte finish, this planter offers a classic look to your garden or porch. Perfectly crafted to hold your plants, this piece is the perfect accessory for your green thumb.

A TOUCH OF PERSONALITY: Bring your outdoor area to life with our delightful cast stone planter. With sleek aesthetics, this accessory will not only enliven your backyard or patio space but also provides space to grow plants.

TAPERED DESIGN: This planter features beautifully tapered shape, giving your outdoor space a stunning accent. This offers a polished look for a modern touch to your home.

CAST STONE: Constructed with lightweight concrete, this planter offers a smooth, tapered design that also has a highly durable structure and is resistant to outdoor elements.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your outdoor space. The planter is 13.00” L x 13.00” W x 24.75” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this accessory.

NO ASSEMBLY: This planter comes ready to use straight out of the box. No assembly is required.
